creator: graudeejs@gmail.com
text:
Today I tried to update nvidia-driver, and


===>   Registering installation for nvidia-driver-295.59
Installing nvidia-driver-295.59...pkg: nvidia-driver-295.59 conflicts with xorg-server-1.7.7_5,1 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/extensions/libglx.so
*** Error code 3

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver.



NOTE: Using pkgng
